markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Deno

Deno is a simple, modern and secure runtime for JavaScript and TypeScript that uses V8 and is built in Rust.

This list is a collection of the best Deno modules and resources.

Contents

  • Docs
    • Official Docs
    • External Docs
    • Online Playgrounds

Docs

Official Docs

  • Official Site
  • Deno API Reference
    • Deno Unstable API Reference
  • Deno Manual

External Docs

  • V8 Docs for Deno
  • DenoBeginner.com - A completely free crash course on deno for beginners.

Online Playgrounds

  • deno.town
  • Deno Playground
    • maman/deno-playgroundstars58
  • DenoBR Playground
  • myCompiler.io
  • Repl.it

Modules

NOTICE: Deno has a few official modules that could be found at deno_std. Consider submitting to the deno.land/x registry.

Automation

  • autopilotstars436 - Autopilot - Cross-platform web automation with Deno.

CLI utils

  • cacstars1.9k - Simple yet powerful framework for building command-line apps.
  • charmdstars43 - A simple, extendable markdown renderer for your terminal.
  • chartstars50 - Console ASCII line charts with no dependencies.
  • cli-spinnerstars53 - Show spinners in the terminal while running long tasks.
  • cliffystars481 - The complete solution for building interactive command-line tools.
  • kiastars42 - Simple terminal spinners for Deno 🦕
  • terminal_imagesstars30 - A Deno module and CLI tool for displaying images in the terminal.
  • with-envstars2 - Simple command line utilty for executing commands with one or more .env files.
  • yargsstars10.1k - The modern, pirate-themed successor to optimist.

Cloud APIs

  • aws-api - From-scratch Typescript AWS API client built for Deno.
  • googleapis - Auto-generated Google API clients for Deno.

Database

  • aloedbstars99 - Light, Embeddable, NoSQL database for Deno without dependencies.
  • cottonstars127 - SQL Database Toolkit for deno
  • dangoDBstars94 - A MongoDB ODM for Deno.
  • denodbstars1.8k - MySQL, SQLite, MariaDB, PostgreSQL and MongoDB ORM for Deno.
  • deno_mongostars456 - MongoDB database driver.
  • deno_mysqlstars233 - MySQL database driver.
  • dndbstars71 - Persistent and embedable NoSQL database engine written for Deno 🦕.
  • dsddbstars11 - A dead simple persistant key-value database utilizing the JSON format.
  • dsostars86 - A simple ORM library based on mysql.
  • maxminddbstars8 - A library that enables the usage of MaxmindDB geoIP database files
  • postgresstars528 - Driver for PostgreSQL database.
  • redisstars394 - An experimental implementation of redis client for deno.
  • sql-builderstars53 - An sql query builder.
  • yongostars4 - Subset of Mongoose api in deno (like populate) but will not fully copy mongoose

Editor framework

  • Denopsstars446 - 🐜 An ecosystem to write Vim/Neovim plugins with Deno.

Frontend development

  • postcssstars51 - A tool for transforming styles with JS plugins.

Frontend framework

  • aleph.jsstars4.8k - A React framework in Deno, inspired by Next.js.
  • freshstars9.2k - Preact, but super edgy. The next-gen web framework.
  • reflexstars24 - React Framework for Deno and Oak.
  • ultrastars2.7k - 💎 Modern Streaming React Framework in Deno.

Game engine

  • caviarstars81 - ⚡ Blazing fast, modern, Game Engine powered by WebGPU for Deno and the browser
  • nekostars40 - 🐈 caviar's twin frame buffer deno module with a framebuffer canvas implementation
  • sdl2stars96 - SDL2 module for Deno

Image

  • ImageScriptstars452 - Image processing in JavaScript, utilizing WebAssembly for performance.

Logging

  • gardensstars34 - A useful logging utility for JavaScript everywhere.
  • sentry_denostars11 - Unofficial port of the Sentry SDK for JavaScript to Deno.
  • dlogstars2 - A ussefull logger for the prompt with icons or simple version!

Machine learning

  • netsaurstars90 - Powerful machine learning, accelerated by WebGPU
  • synapticstars13 - Dependency-less neural network library ported to deno

Mail

  • deno-smtpstars66 - A smtp mail sender for deno.

Markdown

  • markedstars7 - Markdown-to-HTML converter.

Math

  • neostars42 - Matrix and other math, accelerated by WebGPU

String utils

  • camelcasestars8 - Convert a dash/dot/underscore/space separated string to camelCase: foo-bar → fooBar.
  • deno_case_stylestars3 - String validator and formater for different case style. eg: camelCase etc.
  • deno-json-colorizerstars2 - A library for colorizing JSON strings in Deno
  • deno-prettystringstars6 - Format, trim and remove extra white spaces between characters from string.
  • deno-slugifystars19 - A string slugifier for deno.
  • normalize_diacritics - Remove accents/diacritics in string.
  • writtenstars1 - A provides a set of utilities for manipulating text, with a focus on providing typographic tools rather than pure string manipulation.

Social Platform APIs

  • grammYstars666 - Telegram Bot API framework for Deno.
  • grmstars17 - Telegram MTProto client for Deno.
  • twistars5 - Twitter API v2 client for Deno.
  • discordeno - Discord API library for Deno

Template engine

  • dejsstars132 - Ejs template engine for deno.
  • deno_tiny_templatesstars6 - Template renderer for deno.
  • etastars632 - Fast, lightweight, and configurable embedded template engine.
  • handlebarsstars22 - Handlebars template engine for deno
  • mustachestars7 - Mustache template engine for deno

Testing

  • deno-pretty-assertstars26 - A colorful assertEqual for deno.
  • deno-puppeteerstars321 - A library which provides a high-level API to control Chromium or Chrome over the DevTools Protocol.
  • expectstars40 - Helpers for writing jest like expect tests in deno.
  • merlinstars47 - Testing and Benchmarking framework for deno 🧙‍♂️
  • pretty_benchingstars24 - A small library to make your Deno benchmarking progress and results look pretty.
  • rhumstars93 - A lightweight testing framework for Deno.
  • superdenostars113 - Super-agent driven library for testing Deno HTTP servers.
  • superoakstars96 - HTTP assertions for Oak made easy via SuperDeno.
  • tincanstars34 - A Jest-like testing library for Deno.
  • unexpectedstars366 - Extensible BDD assertion toolkit.

Utils

  • bettermapstars12 - A TypeScript extension of the JavaScript Map with Array-like features.
  • benostars1 - A configuration manager typed and faster for Deno Inspired in Viper of Golang
  • bucketsstars20 - Bundle assets and scripts in a single executable file.
  • bytes_formaterstars4 - Format bytes (Uint8Array, ArrayBufferView, etc) output, useful when debugging IO functions.
  • canonifystars6 - Stringify data structures to deterministically ordered JSON for consistent hashing and digital signatures per JCS RFC8785.
  • coffeestars32 - Deno Configuration - a type-safe, easy to use Deno config manager.
  • computed_typesstars327 - Joi like validators for Typescript and Deno.
  • cubic-bezierstars1 - Get an array of points in a cubic bezier curve or visualize in a canvas.
  • dccstars11 - Deno Cache Clean, reloading deps when next running.
  • denon - A file watcher with a for-await generator.
  • deno-configstars3 - Utility to streamline deno app configuration management through cli, .env and json files
  • deno-contextstars6 - Propagate deadlines, a cancellation and other request-scoped values to multiple promise. The behaviour is like Go's context.
  • deno_cronstars77 - A cron Job scheduler that allows you to write human readable cron syntax with tons of flexibility
  • deno-deamonstars11 - Make the Deno program run in the background.
  • deno-dotenv
    • pietvanzoen/deno-dotenvstars149 - Dotenv handling for deno.
    • cardosomarcos/deno-dotenvstars7 - Loads environment variables from .env for Deno projects.
  • deno-fnparsestars11 - An extremely simple parser combinator for JavaScript.
  • deno-globrexstars7 - Port of globrex to deno, glob to regular expression.
  • deno_notifystars31 - Send desktop notifications on all platforms.
  • deno-opnstars33 - Opens stuff like websites, files, executables. Cross-platform.
  • deno-plugin-preparestars46 - A library for managing Deno native plugin dependencies.
  • deno_random_intervalstars1 - Helper to generate random interval.
  • deno_tokenizerstars10 - A simple tokenizer for deno.
  • deno-usingstars11 - An python-style with statements for deno.
  • deno-validationstars1 - A general purpose validation library for Deno.
  • dinoenv - tiny library to manage environment variables with deno.
  • durationjsstars19 - Get formatted time duration from a timestamp or a human-readable string.
  • dracostars2 - File and folder multiplatform utils for Deno!
  • ensurestars2 - Ensure you are running a minimum version of Deno, Typescript, or V8.
  • evtstars388 - Type safe replacement for EventEmitter.
  • fastest-validatorstars1.2k - Schema validator for all javascript platforms
  • fortunastars12 - Weighted gacha system.
  • fossilstars4 - A value-type validation suite.
  • garn-yamlstars2 - Read or write yaml interpolating env variables.
  • garn-validatorstars42 - Create validations with ease.
  • invert-kvstars2 - Invert key-value pairs in Deno.
  • lazystars31 - A linq-like lazy-evaluation iteration module.
  • maze_generatorstars35 - Javascript module for generating, solving, analyzing and displaying mazes.
  • msstars13 - Easily convert various time formats to milliseconds.
  • onlinestars5 - Check if you're currently online in Deno.
  • optionalsstars98 - Rust-like error handling and options with exhaustive pattern matching.
  • qrcodestars28 - QR code image generator for Deno.
  • recursive-readdirstars7 - Recursively read directories in Deno.
  • rubicostars212 - 🏞 [a]synchronous function composition; it just works.
  • solcstars67 - 💎 Solidity bindings for Deno.
  • tryifystars4 - Functional style error handling; never throw/try/catch/finally again.
  • type-feststars13 - A collection of essential TypeScript types (port of sindresorhus/type-fest).
  • unified-deno-lockstars0 - Powerful and simple lock (mutex) library to handle race conditions with zero dependencies
  • wasm-gzipstars15 - Perform gzip operations for Deno.
  • watchstars40 - A file watcher.
  • wu-diff-jsstars16 - A diff library to compute differences between two slices using wu(the O(NP)) algorithm.
  • PLSstars4 - Use 2 lines to persist localStorage in any database, including, but not limited to, MongoDB, PostgreSQL and Redis.

Validation

  • zodstars12.4k - TypeScript-first schema validation with static type inference.

Video

  • Fast Forwardstars27 - An easy to use ffmpeg module for Deno. 🦕

Web framework

  • abcstars598 - A better Deno framework to create web application.
  • alosaurstars764 - Alosaur - Deno web framework with many decorators.
  • attainstars78 - A middleware web framework for Deno which is using http standard library inspired by express and Oak. Fast and stable with proper memory usage.
  • aquastars218 - A minimal and fast web framework for Deno.
  • deno-expressstars281 - Node Express ported to Deno.
  • denotrainstars102 - All-in-One web framework like express or fastify for Node.js with middleware support.
  • dinatrastars402 - Sinatra like light weight web app framework for deno.
  • doastars22 - A middleware framework for Deno's http serve🦕. Transplanted from Koa with ❤️
  • drashstars1k - A REST microframework for Deno's HTTP server with zero dependencies.
  • faststars62 - Small web framework with near-native performance.
  • fasterstars17 - A fast and optimized middleware server with a set of useful middlwares.
  • microraptorstars5 - Lightweight framework for easy network routing with validation.
  • oakstars4.4k - A middleware framework for Deno's net server.
    • oak-http-proxystars26 - Proxy middleware for Deno Oak HTTP servers.
  • opinestars833 - Fast, minimalist web framework ported from ExpressJS.
    • opine-http-proxystars11 - Proxy middleware for Deno Opine HTTP servers.
  • pogostars462 - Server framework for Deno.
  • serveststars745 - A progressive HTTP server/router.

WebSocket

  • deno-websocketstars132 - 🦕A simple WebSocket library like ws of node.js library.
  • dropperstars25 - Custom event-based WebSockets framework for building real-time apps on Deno 🦕
  • websocket_serverstars9 - A WebSocket server library.
  • wocketstars102 - A WebSocket library for Deno.

Web utils

  • compressionstars35 - Deno HTTP compression middleware.
  • djwtstars165 - Make JSON Web Tokens (JWT) on Deno based on JWT and JWS specifications.
  • forwardedstars8 - Deno port of forwarded library.
  • gentleRpcstars35 - A JSON-RPC 2.0 TypeScript library for Deno and the browser.
  • gqlstars149 - Universal GraphQL HTTP middleware.
  • graphql-tagstars7 - GraphQL schema AST from template literal.
  • natsstars96 - A Deno client for the NATS messaging system.
  • obsidianstars5 - A native GraphQL caching client and server module.
  • qsstars5 - A query string parser with nesting support.
  • routerstars50 - A high-performance basic router works anywhere.
  • statusstars12 - HTTP codes and status utility for Deno.
  • ts-prometheusstars15 - A prometheus client.
  • upstars11 - Check if a website is up in Deno.
  • youtube-denostars37 - A Deno client library for the YouTube Data API for any interaction with YouTube.

Webview

  • Astrodonstars725 - Modular framework for building native multi-platform apps with Deno and webview.
  • webviewstars1.1k - Deno bindings for webview, a tiny library for creating web-based desktop GUIs.

XML

  • deno-xml-parserstars22 - Deno XML parser ported from segmentio/xml-parser.
  • sax-tsstars10 - SAX-style XML parser ported from sax-jsstars1k.

Registries

  • crux.land - A free registry service meant for hosting small ( < 10kB) single deno scripts.
  • Deno PKG - An easier way to use code from GitHub in your Deno project.
  • Denopkg.dev - Use any public/private repository from GitHub/GitLab in your Deno project.
  • deno.land/x/ - The official 3rd party module registry.
  • nest.land - An immutable, blockchain powered Deno package registry. 🥚

Showcases

  • AuthCompanionstars91 - A token-based user management server.
  • Deno Reststars83 - A Boilerplate for deno RESTful apis.
  • Deno Seedstars47 - Complete boilerplate for development.
  • Edrysstars224 - Remote Teaching Software
  • GitHub Profile Trophystars3k - 🏆 Add dynamically generated GitHub Trophy on your readme
  • UsingDeno - Curated list of Web Applications & Projects using Deno 🦕.
  • Saleor Deno Merchstars18 - A fork of the original Deno Merch e-commerce website, rebuilt with Saleorstars17k.

Tools

  • commandsstars8 - Create commands shortcuts for node js and deno
  • clonestars4 - A simple utility for the convenient clone.
  • decensestars6 - Generate a license with one deno run command.
  • dedepstars66 - Manage dependency versions.
  • denoflowstars202 - Configuration as code, use YAML to write automated workflows that run on Deno, with any Deno modules, Typescript/Javascript codes
  • denoifystars770 - For NPM module authors that would like to support Deno but do not want to write and maintain a port.
  • denoinit - Denoinit generates useful files for Deno project.
  • denoliverstars91 - A simple, dependency free file server with live reload.
  • denomanderstars126 - Deno command-line interfaces inspired from commander.js.
  • denonstars1.1k - A daemon script runner, like nodemon. Built in and for Deno.
  • denopkgstars224 - An easier way to use code from GitHub in your Deno project.
  • denoversionstars6 - SemVer and git version management for Deno.
  • denoxstars137 - Like packages.json scripts, but for Deno with permissions support.
  • deno.mkstars13 - Cross-platform Makefile for installing and running Deno.
  • maxmcd's deno-dockerstars74 A docker image.
  • hayd's deno-dockerstars697 Several docker images.
  • deno-vscodestars144 - Leverage the typedef and intellisense built into vscode using this extension.
  • dev_serverstars22 - Let TypeScript files be used directly in the script tag.
  • dmmstars58 - Lightweight Deno Module Manager
  • dntstars510 - Deno to npm package build tool.
  • dpm
    • BoltDoggy/deno#dpmstars11 - Deno Package Manager, install global command for deno. like denoget.
    • dpmland/dpmstars39 - Deno Package Manager, a NPM | Yarn Experience for Deno
  • dvm
    • justjavac/dvmstars470 - Deno Version Manager: manage multiple active Deno versions.
    • axetroy/dvmstars161 - Version manger for Deno without runtime dependencies.
    • dvm.cmdstars2 - Deno Version Manager for Windows. Written as a single batch file.
    • ghosind/dvmstars25 - A lightweight Deno Version Manager for Linux/MacOS.
  • elm-live-reload - An elm live reloader written in Deno.
  • kopo-clistars19 - A Deno registry browser in the terminal.
  • lumestars811 - A static site generator similar to Jekyll or Eleventy with support for multiple file formats.
  • make-deno-editionstars42 - Automatically makes package.json projects (such as npm packages and node.js modules) compatible with Deno.
  • nessiestars501 - Create, migrate and rollback migrations for PostgreSQL, MySQL and SQLite.
  • packer-provisioner-denostars4 - A Packer plugin that makes it easy to build virtual machine images with Deno scripts.
  • pagicstars1.4k - The easiest way to generate static html page from markdown, built with Deno.
  • pika Deno plugin
  • pre-commit-denostars3 - pre-commit git hooks for Deno projects.
  • starterstars20 - Deno module starter template with GitHub Actions CI
  • trexstars714 - Package management like npm for deno.
  • uddstars235 - Update Deno dependencies: updates import statements to their latest published version.
  • velociraptorstars651 - An npm-style script runner for Deno.
  • vscode-denostars1.3k - VS Code extension that provides Deno support using the TypeScript Deno language service plugin.
  • vscode-deno-starterstars1 - VS Code project boilerplate to get started with Deno.
  • Update Deno - Github Action that puts a file with the latest Deno Version in your repository.
  • denofn-selfhostedstars23 - Self-hosted Deno functions, made with Deno and Docker.
